description: Integrate Isaacus legal NLP ecosystem: Open Australian Legal Corpus, MLEB benchmark extension, Kanon 2 retrieval evaluation, semchunk, Blackstone Graph, and Legal RAG Bench.
oracle_notes: Repo-side Track 22 implementation is complete: offline Isaacus dataset/model/tool manifests, AU legal row normalization, PipelineRecord conversion, deterministic local NZ-MLEB fixture with schema validation, fail-closed network/proprietary API access gates, audit-only scripts, documentation, focused tests, and an explicit external gate manifest. Live Hugging Face downloads, Kanon API or air-gapped evaluation, AU-to-NZ fine-tuning, measured NZ-MLEB baselines, semchunk comparison, Blackstone Graph release monitoring, and Hub publication remain external gates.
